title: Advanced Writing — Reports & Proposals
topics: report structure · proposals · formal language · recommendations
description: Psaní formálních zpráv, návrhů a doporučení na úrovni B2/C1.
notes: ✓ Report structure: Executive Summary → Introduction → Findings → Recommendations → Conclusion
✓ Passive for objectivity: 'It was found that...' / 'It is recommended that...'
✓ Hedging: 'The data suggests...' / 'It would appear that...'
✓ Recommendations: 'It is strongly recommended that...' / 'We propose that...'
⚠️  Avoid first person in formal reports: NOT 'I think' — use 'The evidence suggests'

examples.en: This report examines the feasibility of implementing a four-day working week.
examples.cz: Tato zpráva zkoumá proveditelnost zavedení čtyřdenního pracovního týdne.

examples.en: It is recommended that the company invest in staff training.
examples.cz: Doporučuje se, aby společnost investovala do školení zaměstnanců.

examples.en: The findings indicate a significant gap in customer satisfaction.
examples.cz: Zjištění naznačují výraznou mezeru v spokojenosti zákazníků.

examples.en: A contingency plan should be prepared in case of budget overruns.
examples.cz: Záložní plán by měl být připraven pro případ překročení rozpočtu.

quiz.sentence: The report ___ that staff morale has declined. (found)
It is ___ that the system be upgraded immediately.
The ___ of the project is to reduce costs by 15%.
We need a ___ plan in case the main supplier fails.

tasks: 1. Write a short report (200 words) on a problem at work or university with recommendations
2. Write an executive summary (50 words) for a report on remote working benefits
3. Draft a proposal for improving something in your organisation or community
